overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring the interior of an old, ornate building resembling a historic hotel. The character moves through dimly lit hallways, a grand lobby with a chandelier, a side room with a skylight, and ascends a grand staircase, featuring atmospheric lighting and detailed environmental storytelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic hotel lobby with ornate woodwork and chandeliers

events.description: exits narrow hallway into grand open lobby with high ceilings and large windows
approaches and stops briefly at double doors labeled RESTAURANT

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the lobby, glancing at a wall map and ornate wooden fixtures while heading toward the restaurant entrance

entered.detail: framed map mounted on the wall at the end of the narrow hallway
large ornate chandelier hanging from the coffered ceiling
tall arched window with multiple panes allowing diffused natural light
grand wooden staircase with white railings visible in the background
decorative wooden structure with blue panels, possibly an old elevator or information booth
vintage-style sofa with patterned fabric against the wall
double wooden doors with glass panels and RESTAURANT signage above

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow hallway with a wall map, then emerges into a grand hotel lobby featuring a large chandelier, ornate wooden fixtures, and vintage furniture. The space is dimly lit with natural light filtering through arched windows as the character approaches a set of doors marked RESTAURANT.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor leading to storage room with skylight

events.description: pushes through restaurant doors into a narrow, dimly lit corridor with red walls
enters a room with a large glass skylight brightening the space from above

agents.ego_description: moving through the dark corridor and entering a side room containing covered furniture and storage boxes

entered.detail: wooden door with decorative stained glass panels
narrow hallway with dark red walls and minimal lighting
large grid-patterned skylight in the ceiling allowing natural light
furniture draped with white sheets suggesting storage or renovation
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor near the furniture

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow corridor through the restaurant doors, transitioning from the grand lobby to a confined service area. The lighting shifts dramatically as they enter a storage room illuminated by a large skylight, revealing covered furniture and cardboard boxes scattered about.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with skylight and french doors leading outside

events.description: tilts camera upward to look at the skylight in the ceiling
exits the storage room back into the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: pausing to examine the skylight and surrounding clutter, then moving toward glass doors before turning back into the corridor

entered.detail: tall glass doors with wooden shutters revealing outdoor greenery
green leafy plant in a planter near the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the storage room, the character looks up at the skylight revealing overcast skies and vegetation growing on the glass. They approach french doors showing outdoor greenery, then turn and exit back through the dark corridor with red carpet, leaving the cluttered room behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand lobby and main staircase leading to upper floor

events.description: returns to the main lobby from the dark corridor
begins ascending the grand wooden staircase toward the upper floor

agents.ego_description: walking back through the lobby and climbing the grand staircase, examining paintings on the upper landing

entered.detail: large ornate chandelier visible again upon returning to the lobby
wide wooden staircase with white railings leading to the second floor
wooden landing at the top of the stairs with framed artwork on walls
several framed paintings hanging on the upper wall including a portrait

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the grand lobby, passing under the chandelier once more, and approaches the main staircase. They ascend the wooden stairs toward the upper floor, where framed paintings and a wooden railing become visible, ending at a door on the upper landing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the expansive elegance of a grand hotel lobby into a claustrophobic service area before ascending to the building's upper floor. It begins in a narrow hallway beside a wall map, emerging into a dimly lit lobby filled with ornate wooden fixtures and a large chandelier as the character approaches the restaurant doors. As they pass through these doors, the scene shifts abruptly from the open lobby to a dark, confined corridor that opens into a storage room illuminated by a large skylight revealing overcast skies and overgrown vegetation. The camera then retreats back through the red-carpeted corridor, returning to the grand lobby to pass under the chandelier once more. Finally, the movement turns toward the main staircase, ascending the wooden steps past framed paintings to reach a door on the upper landing.
